# AGENTS.md — Way-CMS

## Project Overview

Simple web CMS for editing HTML/CSS files downloaded from Wayback Archive. Features file browser, syntax highlighting, search, and Docker support.

- **Repo:** [GeiserX/Way-CMS](https://github.com/GeiserX/Way-CMS)
- **Language:** Python
- **License:** GPL-3.0

## Security

> **Do not commit secrets to the repository.**
> Use environment variables or secure vaults for credentials.
